# Player 1 FBX files

Put Player 1's character mesh/skeleton and animations here.

Expected filenames:

```text
character.fbx
idle.fbx
walk_forward.fbx
walk_back.fbx
jump.fbx
crouch.fbx
block.fbx
punch.fbx
kick.fbx
heavy.fbx
hit_react.fbx
ko.fbx
victory.fbx
```

If your animation filenames are different, edit `src/animationMap.js`.
